title: HedgeMod
description: A Minecraft Mod based on many random Sonic the Hedgehog Games! 3D Blast, Colors, Sonic 4, and More!!
body:
![The Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d839cd286eb4ad3ff1a8e049abfbe28429e93bb.png)

## -IMPORTANT-
## As of Dec 3, 2025, updates Will no longer occur for this project unless I change my mind down the road. please download version 1.2.8 for either forge editions. Thank you for checking this mod out!

A Minecraft Mod that features various (and random) things from the Sonic the Hedgehog Games. Featuring Blocks and such from games such as: 

- Sonic 3D Blast
- Sonic R
- Sonic Rush
- Sonic 4 (Ep I and II)
- Sonic Colors
- And More..!!!

This also includes some new items either taken or inspired from different sonic games, which should aid you in Survival Mode:

**Continue Bin**

![The Continue Bin, based off the Ring Gates from Sonic R](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd4aaed143477e237790ea209cc63140a5f6957.png)

- Upon Finding the Sonic Tokens (found on the Regal Ruins Structures, or by crafting them), You can them give them to the bin here. Upon giving the tokens to it, you'll be granted some XP and Health, use wisely as it can help whenever you're in a real tough spot health wise.

**Gaia Portal**

![The Gaia Portal, thankfully not as brutal as the real in game portals are lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e61f3e393c94dfc4701e5496da0aade444bb7c24.png)

- Upon crafting the Sun/Moon Medals, you can gain a good amount of XP while also changing the time of day, depending on which medal you have in your inventory. Unless you like to mess with time a little, unfortunately theres no werehog/weresteve mode that happens at night when using these, sorry unleashed fans. :(

**Don Fachio**

![Don Fachio, the guy who sells hotdogs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f9d3852c84edf0d13e2e316dd8bb6235888487_0.webp)

- A new villager type, known as the Food Vendor. When you interact with him, with the exchange of some of those coins mentioned earlier, you can get your hands on some delicious Chili Dogs, but he also offers other available foods, some are costly though!

**Wisps**

![White Wisp, among many others to be featured here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a321bf9e0ef5bc71147c1aea42d4858410085861.png)

- These cute little guys give you crazy abilities to use during your survival journey. Upon using the wisp capsule, you can capture them and be able to use their abilities. Can you collect and use them all?


This mod was made out of love for the Sonic Series, for fun purposes only. This was made out of inspiration from EnderPreston's [SoniCraft Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/sonicraft). Speaking of which... i **HEAVILY** recommend you get that mod alongside this mod. 

Also, keep in mind that this is a very creative mode heavy mod and some things i may forget to add to accomodate survival mode players. there are some things obviously, but every once in a while i might forget something that could be useful in a survival world, so just bear that in mind.

-Credits-

Many of the textures/sprites were made and used with great help from the Models, Textures, and Spriters Resource. The credits to those go to SEGA, Aspect, Sonic Team, Traveller's Tales, and Techokami, as well as Trish Rowdy. Some custom sprites were used, and credits to those go to talonmonster
